title: Max Yzaguirre
compiled_truth: Max Yzaguirre is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-06), Max Yzaguirre sent 8 and received 242 emails, totalling 250 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (5), [Marc Sabine](people/marc-sabine) (3), [Peggy Banczak](people/peggy-banczak) (2), [Steve Irvin](people/steve-irvin) (2), [David Delainey](people/david-delainey) (1).
